title: Trump set to deliver State of the Union address amid economic and diplomatic tensions
description: President Trump is set to deliver his first State of the Union address of his second term, as he faces a host of key issues from tariffs to Iran.
content: President Trump is set to deliver his first State of the Union address of his second term, as he faces a host of key issues from tariffs to Iran.
